ids.notes: name not owned (shared with idn 420) — repeating current value, which condenses the cut-in's key words 散布/粒子 into 5 cells. Cut-in kept: 散布米诺夫斯基粒子 matches biligame canonical phrasing (米诺夫斯基粒子散布装置).

ids.cutin_zh: 为了开拓我等宇宙居民的道路！
ids.notes: JP cutin has typo スベースノイド for スペースノイド (Spacenoid) = 宇宙居民 (community standard). Reworded to keep 开拓/道路 shared with the 5-cell name and the officer voice 我等 used across this bark set.

barks.zh: 锁定攻击目标！集中火力！
人类由我等来救！休想阻挠！
用齐射做个了断！各炮位、好好瞄准！
敌人可不会等我们！一击脱离！
炮手别停火！这距离闭眼都能中！
我们也没指望毫发无伤！
那份力量、岂能让联邦利用！！

notes: Ship-officer voice kept formal (我等 for proclamations、我们 conversationally). Structural leading punctuation mirrored from JP: ！ on the three 一斉射撃 records and 、 on 0x30138 (records that continue a preceding string; JP has them and old ZH inconsistently dropped/invented text 各炮 there). Several old lines exceeded budget_bytes under the brief cost rule (0x2F610 0x2F630 0x2F660 0x2F78C 0x2F820 0x300FC 0x3011C 0x3015C 0x3027C 0x303B4 0x3032C 0x3034C) and were rephrased to fit. Fixes: しまった now 糟了 (was 完了); triple ！！！ removed; missing JP nuances restored where budget allowed (leading …… on 0x2F744/0x2F7E8、stammer 什、什么 on 0x2F7A8、だと→竟 on 0x302D8/0x30394、急げ→快 on the 退舰 lines、よく狙って→好好瞄准). Ideal longer lines that did not fit: 0x2F6E4/0x30220 到此为止吗……全员快弃舰！(か+急げ both); 0x2F7E8 ……看到了吗！这就是我等之力！; 0x2F610 挫敌锐气！打开全炮门！
